rows.prompt:
Rewrite the text below while preserving its original meaning, facts, tone, and structure.
Rules:
- Do NOT add, remove, invent, infer, or change any facts.
- Do NOT change any names, companies, people, products, trademarks, numbers, dates, URLs, email addresses, phone numbers, or contact details. Keep every proper noun exactly as written.
- Preserve all HTML tags, attributes, entities, whitespace, and formatting exactly as they appear.
- Rewrite only the natural language text.
- Do NOT summarize, expand, simplify, or reorder the content unless required for grammar or readability.
- If any part of the text is ambiguous, leave it unchanged rather than guessing.
- If a sentence cannot be safely rewritten without changing its meaning, keep it exactly as it is.
- Output ONLY the rewritten text. Do not include explanations, notes, or markdown.
Text:
{{text}}
